findings.title: WordPress WPvivid Plugin — Unauthenticated RCE
findings.summary: Unauthenticated RCE via file upload in WPvivid plugin with 900K+ installs; mass-exploitation imminent.

findings.title: ClickFix Campaigns Surge — Now 53% of All Malware Loader Activity
findings.summary: ClickFix evolved with DNS-based delivery, Matanbuchus 3.0, and macOS variants; fueled 53% of all malware loaders in 2025.

findings.title: GS7 Threat Actor — Fortune 500 Phishing via Telegram Bots
findings.summary: GS7 actor phishing Fortune 500 via 150+ lookalike domains and Telegram bots; potential initial access broker for ransomware.

noted.summary: SQL injection, CISA KEV flagged. Older CVE now exploited.
Unrestricted file upload, CISA KEV. Requires admin.
Code download without integrity check. Fixed with double-lock mechanism.
New variant with live C2 and webcam streaming capability.
Trial accounts weaponized for spam targeting government/corporate.
119 ransomware groups targeting industrial orgs in 2025; 3,300 hit (49% increase).
